states.name: requested
states.description: Enrollment request exists but has not been approved.
entry_requirements: Requestor, proposed Node identity evidence and requested scope are recorded.

states.name: under_review
states.description: Ownership, identity, trust and policy are being evaluated.
entry_requirements: Review authority and protocol are recorded.

states.name: approved
states.description: Enrollment is approved for the recorded scope and trust policy.
entry_requirements: Approval, owner, trust policy and credential/certificate issuance references exist.

states.name: rejected
states.description: Enrollment was denied and no Node authority was granted.
entry_requirements: Rejection authority and reason are retained.

states.name: revoked
states.description: Previously approved enrollment authority has been revoked.
entry_requirements: Revocation authority, reason, effective time and credential revocation evidence are retained.

states.name: expired
states.description: Enrollment authority expired without current renewal.
entry_requirements: Expiry time and policy are retained.

required_preconditions: Proposed Node identity evidence and requested scope are present.
An authorized reviewer and review protocol are assigned.
Ownership, identity and trust policy pass; exact scope and expiry are fixed.
Rejection reason and reviewer authority are retained.
Revocation reason and affected credentials/leases are identified.
Recorded expiry has passed without valid renewal.
